text.title: trade-off-build-vs-buy Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for trade-off-build-vs-buy. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Before comparing costs, classify the capability as: Core (direct competitive advantage — prefer build), Context (necessary but not differentiating — prefer buy if mature market exists), or Commodity (standard capability with many providers — always buy). Only Core capabilities justify custom development at startup scale.
rule.rationale: Organizations with proprietary core technology see ~2x stronger revenue growth (Deloitte 2025). Building context and commodity capabilities diverts engineering from the core. The classification must be documented and agreed by product and technical stakeholders before TCO analysis begins.
